watermarks.calendar_sync: Pulled all visible calendars for Monday 2026-05-11: Drake's Plans, Work, Fae's Plans, Family, Hearthstone, US Holidays.
watermarks.calendar_scope_note: Fae's Plans, Family, and US Holidays had no events in this window.

timeline.label: Crafting: Claude
timeline.description: Agent Handbook Daily Command Center - Get a way that I can talk to Claude/Codex naturally and it grabs everything I need and helps me schedule like an actual personal assistant.

timeline.label: Reset, notes, and first pass over work calendar
timeline.notes: Capture outputs from Crafting: Claude and identify what the untitled work calendar blocks need from Gmail/docs.

timeline.label: Morning prep and evidence sweep
timeline.notes: Use attendee/title-scoped Gmail and calendar evidence for the day's work blocks. Convert anything actionable into review-first proposed actions.

timeline.label: Deep work: DCC schedule automation
timeline.notes: Move the automation layer toward reliable meeting prep, transcript intake, and action-item approval.

timeline.label: Follow-ups and itinerary cleanup
timeline.notes: Review any meeting notes/transcripts and approve proposed action items into the itinerary.

timeline.label: Dinner and a Show
timeline.description: Dinner: Show: Season 1, Episode 1 - 3 of AtLA Side Activity.

current.title: Midday Focus Brief
current.summary: DCC is the highest-leverage lane today: yesterday's review exposed source-of-truth friction, today's itinerary has a real schedule, and the active DCC diff is already warm.

retro.summary: Recent activity clustered around making DCC a reliable planning surface, exploring Keepsakes as a modular cozy investigation game, and keeping brain sync/review infrastructure from losing context.

conversations.title: Keepsakes concept and engine shape
conversations.summary: Explored the franchise name, cozy tone, room/object mechanics, and a scalable engine where many objects can be movable without making puzzle objects obvious.

conversations.title: DCC visual planning workflow
conversations.summary: Shifted from prose recommendations toward an approval-based visual brief that can add proposed tasks into the itinerary.

conversations.title: Brain sync and glymphatic hygiene
conversations.summary: Clarified pull/push reporting, generated daily review artifacts, and kept routing packets brain-safe rather than raw-transcript heavy.

questions.question: What should I work on today?
questions.answer: DCC schedule automation had the strongest evidence because it matched the calendar block, active diff, and source-of-truth friction from the prior review.

questions.question: How should the Glymphatic Brief work visually?
questions.answer: It should show lessons, disregarded items, and suggested tasks with recommended times, plus approval controls that push tasks into the itinerary.

questions.question: What should the Keepsakes engine and structure become?
questions.answer: A small first-room prototype that can scale into larger spaces through reusable placement, interaction, asset, and story systems.

project_progress.progress: Added a Brief tab and seeded the first Glymphatic Brief structure; current work is moving toward assistant-generated schedule proposals.
Prototype placement and interaction code is actively changing, but it remains secondary until DCC has a clean checkpoint.
Generated 2026-05-10 and 2026-05-11 review artifacts; Daily-Life-Journal remains missing, causing inbox fallback.
Recent visible activity was limited to cleanup/git hygiene, not a primary focus candidate today.

communications.subject: External communications
communications.summary: No Gmail/Slack outbound summary was available to this local run. Future briefs should ingest connector evidence or sweep-suite reader output.

communications.subject: Brain sync
communications.summary: A 2026-05-11 brainupdate reported pull already current, push everything up to date, and no local changes at that moment.

meetings.title: Crafting: Claude
meetings.summary: Calendar description points at Agent Handbook / DCC work: natural conversation with Claude/Codex that gathers needed context and schedules like an actual personal assistant.

meetings.title: Work calendar blocks
meetings.summary: Several private work blocks are present, but no transcript or meeting notes were available in this local evidence pass.

triage.summary: Gmail, Slack, Discord, and other readers should surface conversations needing attention here. A triage drafting pass should create reviewable drafts in place, then link both the source conversation and the draft for approval.

lessons.text: Early-day glymphatic runs should be treated as source-readiness and focus-orientation checks, not final productivity reviews.
Daily review confidence improves materially once DCC has timeline items instead of a skeleton day.
Suggested tasks need to live where the itinerary lives, with approval controls instead of prose-only recommendations.

disregarded.text: Do not make Keepsakes the main work lane before DCC reaches a clean checkpoint.
disregarded.reason: High creative value, lower immediate systems value.

disregarded.text: Do not treat Offers AMP cleanup as a primary focus block today.
disregarded.reason: Only background git hygiene was visible.

disregarded.text: Do not file durable brain lessons from a partial pre-noon review.

suggested_tasks.title: DCC automation checkpoint
suggested_tasks.reason: Stabilize the current automation diff and make sure today's itinerary remains a trustworthy source of truth.

suggested_tasks.title: Ship Glymphatic Brief panel v1
suggested_tasks.reason: Turn the review output into an approval surface with lessons, disregarded items, and scheduleable recommendations.

suggested_tasks.title: Mount Daily-Life-Journal locally
suggested_tasks.reason: Both recent glymphatic reviews fell back into the brain inbox because the journal repo is missing.

suggested_tasks.title: Keepsakes placement prototype pass
suggested_tasks.reason: Keep creative momentum, but only after DCC has a checkpoint.

history.summary: Filed lessons that DCC skeleton days weaken reviews, Daily-Life-Journal fallback needs fixing, and sync reports must state pull/local/push outcomes separately.

lessons.text: Sync reports must lead with the final remote state.
DCC skeleton days limit daily review confidence.

disregarded.text: No open project retrospective cleanup was needed.

meta.summary: Monday 2026-05-11 plan created from all visible calendars. Real calendar events are preserved, private work blocks are labeled private, and gaps are assigned to prep, deep work, follow-up, and transition blocks.
